$description: Tier 2 — Semantic tokens. Intent-based aliases only. No raw values. Components consume only these tokens. All brand-specific knobs resolve through {brand.*} references so swapping a brand file changes the output.

bg.$description: Fill of the main CTA at rest

bg-hover.$description: Fill of the main CTA on hover/focus

fg.$description: Text and icon color on the main CTA

border-color.$description: Stroke color; only visible when border-width > 0

border-width.$description: Stroke thickness; set to border.width.none to remove

radius.$description: Corner rounding; drives sharp vs pill appearance

shadow.$description: Elevation shadow; set to shadow.none for flat

font-size.$description: Label text size — fixed across brands

padding-x.$description: Horizontal internal spacing — fixed across brands

padding-y.$description: Vertical internal spacing — fixed across brands
